description: Index of minimal repro fixtures. See README.md for schema and lifecycle.

real_docs_blocked.blocker: Spec 2 entanglement: Word=609.5 Oxi=609.0 gap=-0.5 (not -1.0). Multi-line cell drift cancels half the border overhead. Spec 1 alone would regress this doc by +0.5pt.
Orthogonal short-cell bug: Word=15.0 Oxi=20.5 gap=+5.5 in wrong direction. Not a border-overhead failure.

specs.formula: overhead_pt = top + bot + (num_rows - 1) * insideH    (left/right unused). Layout uses declared OOXML sz value, not COM Border.LineWidth (which snaps to wdLineWidth enum quanta).
blocked_on: Spec 2 (row content drift) must ship together OR find ≥2 more real 1-row docs with content short enough that Spec 2 drift snap-rounds to 0
Implementing Spec 1 alone would regress kyodoken10 by +0.5pt — zero-regression rule says no
specs.spec_2_proposed: table_row_height_drift — first attempt REFUTED 2026-04-09 (see that spec entry). Need to re-author with snapToGrid=false matching kyodoken10.
specs.notes: Discovery under the new Ra discipline: 1-row formula looked clean (10/10 variants + 2/2 real tables in 683f) but real-doc cross-check on kyodoken10 revealed entanglement with row content drift. Old net-positive rule would have shipped this and silently regressed kyodoken10.

specs.intent: Reproduce the per-paragraph drift believed to entangle with table_border_overhead in kyodoken10 (-0.5pt over 28-paragraph cell)
specs.refuted_reason: Repro tests a different code path than kyodoken10. (1) v1 used <w:br/> soft breaks which Oxi doesn't parse — separate gap. (2) v2 used separate <w:p> but inherits python-docx-injected pPrDefault spacing line=276 after=200, while kyodoken10 has empty pPrDefault and snapToGrid=false on every cell paragraph. The two paths in Oxi diverge entirely. The 12.16pt/para gap our repro shows is not the same as the 0.018pt/para gap in kyodoken10.
side_findings: <w:br/> soft line break not parsed by Oxi — separate parser gap (parser_gap_w_br_soft_break)
docDefaults pPr/spacing/line and /after possibly not inherited into table cell paragraphs — needs verification (could be python-docx artifact)
specs.next_attempt_required: Re-author with empty pPrDefault, snapToGrid=false, 25-30 paragraphs per cell, sz=4 outer borders. Match kyodoken10 structure exactly.
specs.discipline_note: Caught a non-equivalent minimal repro before any code was changed. Old loop would have measured the wrong thing and 'fixed' a phantom bug. New 3-doc + repro rule is doing its job.
